0.title: Overview
0.text:
- Build name: Cowboy Ninja
- Main idea: Shotgun = damage, Sheriff Stars = mobility
- Playstyle: get close, burst enemies, then reposition before getting surrounded
- Scales well because it combines high shotgun DPS, speed, spell combos, and sustain

1.title: Weapons Loadout
1.text:
- Primary weapon: Shotgun
- Secondary weapon: Sheriff Stars
- Shotgun is used to kill elites, bosses, birds, and priority targets
- Sheriff Stars are used for movement, double jumps, repositioning, and backup damage

2.title: Primary Weapon: Shotgun
2.text:
- Early stat priority: Accuracy first because more pellets hit enemies at range
- Before Overblast: Accuracy, Damage, Fire Rate, Reload Speed, Clip Size
- After Overblast: focus Clip Size and Reload Speed
- Main joker: Overblast
- Why Overblast: extra pellets for every missing round, so low-mag shots become huge damage
- Good jokers: Swift Shot, Relentless, Rampage, Reload Mastery, Machine Gun, Speedster
- Reload Mastery is important because you want to mag-dump often and reload fast

3.title: Secondary Weapon: Sheriff Stars
3.text:
- Main purpose: mobility and repositioning
- Stat priority: Pickup Range first
- Why Pickup Range: lets you safely recover thrown stars without getting too close
- Use Acid element for combos with lightning/electrified enemies
- Key jokers: Jump Star and Scavenger Star
- Jump Star gives double jumps while holding Sheriff Stars
- Scavenger Star gives movement speed and bigger pickup range
- Tip: equip Sheriff Stars, jump, then swap to Shotgun to keep the double-jump movement

4.title: Spells
4.text:
- Take Strikes, Drain, and Mino
- Strikes: lightning line/puddles for AoE
- Drain: healing and sustain
- Mino: mine used for spell combos
- Combo: Mino + Strikes = big star-shaped lightning AoE
- Combo: Strikes + Acid Sheriff Stars = lightning explosions
- Combo: Strikes + Drain = extra healing candles
- Combo: Drain + Mino = corruption mine that turns enemies into allies
- Optional later swap: Drain can be replaced with Corruption for stronger enemy conversion

5.title: Character
5.text:
- Stat priority: Health, Spell Cooldown Reduction, Speed
- Health gives room for mistakes
- Cooldown Reduction lets you use spell combos more often
- Speed helps kiting, dodging, repositioning, and Speedster scaling
- Main jokers: Chad, Disgrace, Speedy Gonzalez, Soul Siphon, Glass Cannon
- Chad helps find and buy from the Wandering Trader
- Disgrace gives movement speed; losing the mount is worth it for combat
- Glass Cannon gives big weapon damage but lowers max HP
- Be careful stacking too many max HP reduction cards

6.title: Strategy and Run Tips
6.text:
- Always prioritize dangerous enemies first: bombers, snipers, gunners, horsemen, liches, and elites
- Use Shotgun to delete priority targets and bosses
- Use Sheriff Stars to escape bad positions
- Do not fight while fully surrounded; reposition and reset the fight
- Collect gold and find the Wandering Trader before the boss
- Clear enemies before opening the trader shop
- Buy useful mid-run jokers like Speedster, Second Wind, damage, fire rate, and movement speed cards
- Before bosses, clear cursed houses and nearby enemies
- During boss fights, kill elites that spawn and avoid getting greedy for healing/ammo
- After the boss, move toward extraction while clearing just enough enemies to avoid being trapped
- Avoid nukers unless you can kill them safely from far away
